heading: Offenses resulting in death
label: 2245 Offenses resulting in death
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 2245 was renumbered .section 2246 of this title

Amendments2006— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “A person who, in the course of an offense under this chapter, engages in conduct that results in the death of a person, shall be punished by death or imprisoned for any term of years or for life.”Pub. L. 109–248
amendments: Amendments2006— amended section catchline and text generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “A person who, in the course of an offense under this chapter, engages in conduct that results in the death of a person, shall be punished by death or imprisoned for any term of years or for life.”Pub. L. 109–248

children.heading: .—1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1In General
children.label: a .—1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1In General
children.text: A person who, in the course of an offense under this chapter, or section 1591, 2251, 2251A, 2260, 2421, 2422, 2423, or 2425, murders an individual, shall be punished by death or imprisoned for any term of years or for life.
